commit_message:
Update to Chisel 7.7.0 Update to Chisel 7.7.0 Update all Chisel code to the latest Chisel (7.7.0).  This has the major effect of changing the underlying FIRRTL compiler used to build the Verilog from the Scala-based FIRRTL Compiler (SFC) [[1]] to the MLIR-based FIRRTL Compiler (MFC or `firtool`) [[2]].  Additionally, as ChiselTest [[3]] is archived/unmaintained, this switches all the testing to use the newer Chisel testing framework, Chiselsim.
